ddls:
CREATE TABLE "arrest_records" (
  "arrest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each arrest record */,
  "arrest_date" TEXT /* Date when the arrest was made */,
  "offense_date" TEXT /* Date when the offense occurred */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the offense took place */,
  "defendant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the defendant involved in the arrest */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the arrest took place */,
  "charges" TEXT /* Charges associated with the arrest */,
  "arresting_officer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the officer who made the arrest */,
  "incident_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("arrest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_arrest_records_arresting_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("arresting_officer_id") REFERENCES officers ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_arrest_records_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_arrest_records_defendant_id FOREIGN KEY ("defendant_id") REFERENCES defendants ("defendant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "defendants" (
  "defendant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each defendant */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the defendant */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the defendant */,
  "age_at_arrest" INTEGER /* Age of the defendant at the time of arrest */,
  "state_of_residence" TEXT /* State of residence of the defendant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the defendant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the defendant */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact for the defendant */,
  "emergency_contact_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact for the defendant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("defendant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "block_location" TEXT /* Block location of the offense */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the offense occurred */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the offense occurred */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charges" (
  "charge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each charge */,
  "charge_description" TEXT /* Description of the charge */,
  "charge_code" TEXT /* Code for the charge */,
  "fine_amount" TEXT /* Fine amount for the charge */,
  "jail_time" INTEGER /* Jail time for the charge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("charge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "arrest_charges" (
  "arrest_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the arrest record */,
  "charge_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the charge */,
  "charge_status" TEXT /* Status of the charge (e.g., pending, dismissed, convicted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("arrest_id", "charge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each officer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the officer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the officer */,
  "badge_number" TEXT /* Badge number of the officer */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the officer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., officer, supervisor, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "arrest_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the arrest record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_arrest_id FOREIGN KEY ("arrest_id") REFERENCES arrest_records ("arrest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the analytics report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data of the report in a structured format (e.g., JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "database_name" TEXT /* Name of the integrated database */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the integrated database */,
  "last_sync_date" TEXT /* Date when the integration was last synchronized */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id")
)
